description: pyOpenSSL is a Python wrapper for a subset of the OpenSSL library. Provides SSL/TLS contexts, X.509 certificates, ASN.1, signing/verification.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pyOpenSSL && python3 pyOpenSSL.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pyOpenSSL && python3 pyOpenSSL.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pyOpenSSL && python3 pyOpenSSL.py --help`. Python wrapper around a small subset of the OpenSSL library.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the crypto category. Fits when the engagement needs: Python wrapper around a small subset of the OpenSSL library.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Python wrapper around a small subset of the OpenSSL library.
